Id.description: The ID assigned to the staff member.

DisplayName.description: The display name of the staff member.

Bio.description: The staff member’s biography. This string contains HTML.

Address.description: The address of the staff member who is teaching the class.

Address2.description: The address2 of the staff member who is teaching the class.

ForeignZip.description: The staff member’s Foreign Zip code.

WorkPhone.description: The staff member’s work phone number.

HomePhone.description: The staff member’s home phone number.

CellPhone.description: The staff member’s mobile phone number.

Active.description: When `true`, indicates that the staff member is Active. When `false`, indicates that the staff member is not Active.

IsSystem.description: When `true`, indicates that the staff member is a system . When `false`, indicates that the staff member is not system.

AppointmentTrn.description: When `true`, indicates that the staff member offers appointments. When `false`, indicates that the staff member does not offer appointments.

AlwaysAllowDoubleBooking.description: When `true`, indicates that the staff member can be scheduled for overlapping services. When `false`, indicates that the staff can only be scheduled for one service at a time in any given time-frame.

IndependentContractor.description: When `true`, indicates that the staff member is an independent contractor. When `false`, indicates that the staff member is not an independent contractor.

ImageUrl.description: The URL of the staff member’s image, if one has been uploaded.

IsMale.description: When `true`, indicates that the staff member is male. When `false`, indicates that the staff member is female.

ReservationTrn.description: When `true`, indicates that the staff member offers Reservation. When `false`, indicates that the staff member does not offer Reservation.

SortOrder.description: If configured by the business owner, this field determines a staff member’s weight when sorting. Use this field to sort staff members on your interface.

MultiLocationPermission.description: When `true`, indicates that the staff member has Multi Location Permission. When `false`, indicates that the staff member does not has Multi Location Permission.

ProviderIDs.description: A list of ProviderIds for the staff.

StaffSettings.description: This object contains the staff settings.

Rep.description: When `true`, indicates that the staff is sales Rep 1 else `false`.

Rep2.description: When `true`, indicates that the staff is sales Rep 2 else `false`.

Rep3.description: When `true`, indicates that the staff is sales Rep 3 else `false`.

Rep4.description: When `true`, indicates that the staff is sales Rep 4 else `false`.

Rep5.description: When `true`, indicates that the staff is sales Rep 5 else `false`.

Rep6.description: When `true`, indicates that the staff is sales Rep 6 else `false`.

Assistant.description: When `true`, indicates that the staff is assistant. When `false`, indicates that the staff is not assistant.

Assistant2.description: When `true`, indicates that the staff is assistant2. When `false`, indicates that the staff is not assistant2.

EmpID.description: The custom staff ID assigned to the staff member.

Appointments.description: A list of appointments for the staff.

Unavailabilities.description: A list of unavailabilities for the staff.

Availabilities.description: A list of availabilities for the staff.

LoginLocations.description: A list of LoginLocations for the staff
